notes: The maze layout is malformed with inconsistent row lengths and misaligned walls, ghost AI is broken (no reverse-direction prevention, pathfinding ignores current direction), pellet detection uses rounding which causes missed/phantom eats, and the overall game is barely playable due to maze rendering issues and erratic ghost movement.

Core Pac-Man structure exists, but the malformed/inconsistent maze, simplistic ghost pathing, and several gameplay-rule inaccuracies make it only partially functional and not very faithful or playable.
